Running command: 
# 2h18m CPU / ~43.2min elapsed. 321% CPU. 1st iteration at 60%.
# Continue every 5 minutes.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 300
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] EXITED!" && break
    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    LOG_BYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(grep -v "^$" /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(Completing|violations|Start [0-9]|DRT-0199)" | tail -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-130)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT72=$(ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}')
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME LOG=${LOG_BYTES}B DRT=$DRT72 FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
